zh.lifeSummary: 當Frederick IV von Nuremberg於1287年8月15日出生在可特格希 貝也纽伦堡時，他的父親Friedrich VI von Hohenzollern-46歲，母親Kunigunde von Baden22歲。他和Margarethe von Kärnten至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1332年5月19日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 班波格史盧瑟爾福爾德霍恩 阿姆 伯格享年44歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_霍恩左勒奧拉赤 賀辛根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frederick IV von Nuremberg于1287年8月15日出生在可特格希 貝也纽伦堡时，他的父亲Friedrich VI von Hohenzollern-46岁，母亲Kunigunde von Baden22岁。他和Margarethe von Kärnten至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1332年5月19日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 班波格史盧瑟爾福爾德霍恩 阿姆 伯格享年44岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_霍恩左勒奧拉赤 賀辛根。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Nuremberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nierenberg
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the city of Nurembergin northern Bavaria, Yiddish name Nirnberg, German nameNürnberg, or from another place similarly named.

nameMeanings.name: Frederick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Fredrick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Fredric
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Frederick IV von Nuremberg was born on 15 August 1287, in Nuremberg, Bavaria, his father, Friedrich VI von Hohenzollern, was -46 and his mother, Kunigunde von Baden, was 22. He had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Margarethe von Kärnten. He died on 19 May 1332, in Hohn am Berg, Schlüsselfeld, Bamberg, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 44, and was buried in Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frederick IV von Nuremberg est né le 15 août 1287, à Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern, son père, Friedrich VI von Hohenzollern, avait -46 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde von Baden, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Margarethe von Kärnten. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1332, à Hohn am Berg, Schlüsselfeld, Landkreis Bamberg, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frederick IV von Nuremberg am 15. August 1287 in Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich VI von Hohenzollern -46 und seine Mutter Kunigunde von Baden 22. Er hatte mit Margarethe von Kärnten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Mai 1332 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Hohn am Berg, Schlüsselfeld, Landkreis Bamberg, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frederick IV von Nuremberg è nato il il 15 agosto 1287 nel Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern, il suo padre, Friedrich VI von Hohenzollern, aveva -46 anni e il suo madre, Kunigunde von Baden, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Margarethe von Kärnten. Morì il 19 maggio 1332, nel Hohn am Berg, Schlüsselfeld, Landkreis Bamberg, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Frederick IV von Nurembergが1287年8月15日にクoニグレイチ バイエルンンuルンバーグで生まれた時，父Friedrich VI von Hohenzollernは-46歳，母Kunigunde von Badenは22歳であった。彼はMargarethe von Kärntenとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1332年5月19日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス バンバーグスチルuセルフエルドホーン アム バーグで44歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンホーヘンゾラーンオバーアムト ヘチンジェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frederick IV von Nuremberg(이)가 1287년 8월 15일 ko니그레이치 베이른 뉘른베르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich VI von Hohenzollern(은)는 -46세였고, 그의 어머니 Kunigunde von Baden(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Margarethe von Kärnten(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 5월 19일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 바버그 슐u셀펠드 호h 아 버그에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 호헨졸레른 오베램트 헤친겐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frederick IV von Nuremberg nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1287, em Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern, seu pai, Friedrich VI von Hohenzollern, tinha -46 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde von Baden, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Margarethe von Kärnten. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1332, em Hohn am Berg, Schlüsselfeld, Landkreis Bamberg, Bayern, Alemanha, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frederick IV von Nuremberg родился 15 августа 1287 г. в местности Нюрнберг, кoниграич беиирн, его отцу по имени Friedrich VI von Hohenzollern было -46 год, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde von Baden, 22. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Margarethe von Kärnten. Он умер 19 мая 1332 г. в местности хохн ам бирг, щлuсселфелд, ландкрис бамбирг, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности обирамт хечинген, хохензоллирн, Пруссия, Германия.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Margarethe von Kärnten.
